name: go2-map-zones
description: Segment an occupancy map into labelled, navigable zones (rooms) with a watershed pipeline — upload an .npz or a nav2 .pgm+.yaml, get back zones.yaml + a visualization, all from a browser. Pure offline map utility; no dog required.

variables.name: PORT
variables.description: Port for the web UI — open http://<device>:<port> in a browser to upload a map and view zones
